title: More Pillager Towers Variants
description: Adds 8 new pillager towers to your world!
body:
![discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f5b4e69f959c6aea82530470166d31152ccc1d7.png)

[Join our discord!](https://discord.com/invite/9UWsTm2svK)
Brand New Discord Server! For Private Support and Update Alerts.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![pillager logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75ac7b2843572cfa82a149ff4adeae849fc57b17.png)
Hey all! this mod added: 8 new pillager towers to your minecraft world. All pillager towers contain loot with a pillager spawner.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

Don't forget to check out my other mods on my profile!

![info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df7a46c0a5a7f98ad54eeca690af5e350effac4f.png)

All pillager towers are built with standard vanilla blocks from Minecraft, and do not contain custom blocks.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec3bd16c52a7f2ddf276766385e0b566022459b2.png)

![jungle tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c9cbdaaa3f7d39576dc5adf1acf45f1bef86bab.png)


![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod is created with: intellij

Disclaimer about product: NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT
